title: Product safety: developing policy and legislation
body: " Updated version  Published in support of the Product Regulation and Metrology Act 2025.   This Code of Conduct is designed to serve those developing product safety policy and legislation by giving them an overview of the different aspects of the UK safety landscape, the place of UK consumers at the heart of UK product safety policy and the collaborative processes by which we develop UK product safety policy.  It sets out the existing legislative and non-legislative ‘guardrails’ around the UK product safety framework and how the Government intends to use the new powers in the Product Regulation and Metrology Act 2025. "
